essence: Installs, maintains, and troubleshoots renewable‑energy systems such as solar, wind, and battery storage.

identity.title: Renewable Energy Technician
identity.summary: Works on the installation, maintenance, and optimisation of renewable‑energy technologies, helping expand clean‑energy infrastructure and reduce carbon emissions.

salary.notes: Technicians specialising in large‑scale wind, grid‑scale batteries, or offshore systems can exceed £55k-£70k+.

qualifications: Training in electrical engineering, renewable energy, or related technical fields
Knowledge of solar PV, wind systems, or battery storage
Ability to install and maintain renewable‑energy equipment
Understanding of safety standards and electrical regulations

lifestyle.description: Renewable energy technicians work for energy companies, installers, manufacturers, and infrastructure providers. They install solar panels, maintain wind turbines, configure battery systems, and support the transition to clean energy. The role suits individuals who enjoy hands‑on technical work, problem‑solving, and contributing to climate solutions.

habits: Performs safety checks and system inspections
Works with engineers, electricians, and energy planners
